info.title: Outlets Service
info.description: Manages press outlets (publications) and their campaign relevance data. Scoped by org × brand × feature × campaign × workflow. Brand fields (brandName, industry, etc.) are fetched from brand-service — callers provide brandId via x-brand-id header and optionally pass featureInput as opaque context for LLM calls.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: API key for authenticating requests. Must match OUTLETS_SERVICE_API_KEY env var.

post.description: Requires all 7 identity headers. Upserts by outlet_domain — if the domain already exists, updates the name/url.

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs for multi-brand campaigns. Example: uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

example.whyRelevant: Top tech publication with high domain authority
example.whyNotRelevant: Highly competitive, may not accept guest posts

example.whyRelevant: Top tech publication with high domain authority
example.whyNotRelevant: Highly competitive, may not accept guest posts

get.description: Returns outlets deduplicated by outlet_id with nested campaign data. Each outlet appears once with a `campaigns` array containing per-campaign details. Filter by campaignId, brandId, status, featureSlug(s), or featureDynastySlug. Supports pagination on distinct outlets.

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — optional for read endpoints

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: runId
parameters.description: Filter by run ID (from discover endpoint)

parameters.name: featureSlugs
parameters.description: Filter by feature slugs (comma-separated). Use a single slug or multiple.

parameters.name: featureDynastySlug
parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolved to all versioned slugs via features-service). Takes priority over featureSlugs.

200.description: List of deduplicated outlets with nested campaigns

latestStatus.description: Enriched status — 'served' outlets may be overridden to contacted/delivered/replied based on email delivery data from journalists-service

status.description: Enriched status — 'served' may be overridden based on email delivery data

replyClassification.description: Best reply classification among journalists at this outlet. Non-null only when status is 'replied'.

total.description: Total number of distinct outlets matching filters

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — optional for read endpoints

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — optional for read endpoints

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

patch.description: Updates the status of an outlet within a campaign. Requires all 7 identity headers. Setting status to 'ended' also sets ended_at timestamp.

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs for multi-brand campaigns. Example: uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

example.reason: No longer relevant to campaign goals
No longer relevant to campaign goals

post.description: Requires all 7 identity headers. All outlets in the batch share the same campaign and brand. Max 500 outlets per request.

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs for multi-brand campaigns. Example: uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

post.description: Full-text search (ILIKE) on outlet name and URL. Optionally scoped to a campaign.

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — optional for read endpoints

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

get.description: Returns outlet discovery stats (count, avg relevance, search queries used). Supports filtering by brandId, campaignId, workflowSlug, featureSlug, and dynasty slugs. Dynasty slug filters resolve to all versioned slugs via workflow-service / features-service.

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — optional for read endpoints

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: workflowSlugs
parameters.description: Filter by multiple workflow slugs (comma-separated). Takes priority over workflowSlug.

parameters.name: featureSlugs
parameters.description: Filter by multiple feature slugs (comma-separated). Takes priority over featureSlug.

parameters.name: workflowDynastySlug
parameters.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug (resolved to all versioned slugs). Takes priority over workflowSlug.

parameters.name: featureDynastySlug
parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug (resolved to all versioned slugs). Takes priority over featureSlug.

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Group results by this dimension. Dynasty groupBy aggregates versioned slugs into their dynasty.

get.description: Returns aggregated discovery costs by querying runs-service for all runs associated with outlets. Supports filters (brandId, campaignId) and optional groupBy (outletId, runId). Without groupBy returns flat totals; with groupBy=outletId returns cost-per-outlet (run cost / outlets in that run); with groupBy=runId returns one row per discovery run.

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — optional for read endpoints

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Group results by dimension. Omit for flat totals.

post.description: Runs parameterized outlet discovery: generates search queries via LLM, searches Google, scores results, and inserts into the campaign buffer. Creates a child run in runs-service for cost tracking. Requires all 7 identity headers.

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs for multi-brand campaigns. Example: uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

400.description: Missing required headers or invalid count

post.summary: Pull the next best outlet(s) from the buffer
post.description: Returns up to `count` (default 1, max 50) highest-scored open outlets for the campaign. If the buffer is empty, triggers a lightweight mini-discover (3 queries × 5 Google results, LLM scoring) to refill it. Supports idempotency via optional idempotencyKey. Requires all 7 identity headers.

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — single UUID or comma-separated UUIDs for multi-brand campaigns. Example: uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

200.description: Array of outlets (may be empty if none available)

get.summary: Lookup outlets by IDs and/or campaignId
get.description: Unified internal endpoint. At least one of `ids` or `campaignId` must be provided. When `campaignId` is provided, returns campaign-enriched outlet data (relevance, status, etc.). When only `ids` is provided, returns base outlet data.

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand ID(s) — optional for read endpoints

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug for tracking (optional, propagated downstream)

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: Filter by campaign ID — includes campaign-specific fields in response

200.description: Outlets found. Shape depends on whether campaignId was provided.
